description_long: This kiosk features a rectangular structure with a flat, overhanging roof in a vibrant coral color, supported by dark brown posts. The front panel displays the word 'ICE' in bold white letters, suggesting it is an ice cream or dessert stand. Atop the kiosk sits a large, stylized ice cream bar with a mint green coating and colorful sprinkles, partially bitten to reveal a brown interior and a wooden stick. The lower shelf area contains two small, blocky objects, possibly representing storage boxes or product displays. The overall design is playful and geometric, with clean lines and a blocky, pixel-art aesthetic reminiscent of video game graphics. The kiosk is compact and likely intended for placement on sidewalks or in parks, serving as a small commercial point of sale.
description: A vibrant, blocky kiosk with a flat coral roof, bold 'ICE' signage, and a large mint-sprinkled ice cream bar sculpture on top. The playful design features geometric shapes and a compact structure ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the large mint ice cream bar with sprinkles and the coral roof, with the stick extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered ice cream bar and the kiosk's rectangular shape, with the stick facing forward.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the 'ICE' signage, the ice cream bar's bitten end, and the lower shelf with two small boxes.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the ice cream bar and the plain back panel of the kiosk.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign integrated into the front panel, displaying the text 'ICE' in bold white letters
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with a slight overhang, painted coral, topped with a large decorative ice cream bar sculpture
